title: Replace partner logos section with combined image on light background

requirements.summary: Generate a light-background version of the pharmaceutical partners logos image
acceptanceCriteria: The logos image displayed on the page does not have a black or dark background
All 5 logos (Smartway Wellness, AquaLab, Smart Laboratories, Cipla, Laborate Pharmaceuticals) are clearly visible
The image background is white or a light neutral tone

file_operations.description: Add the generated combined logos image with a clean white or light neutral background, preserving all five partner logos (Smartway Wellness, AquaLab, Smart Laboratories, Cipla, Laborate Pharmaceuticals India Ltd.) at full visibility. This replaces the dark-background version.

requirements.summary: Replace individual partner logos with the combined light-background image in a compact layout
acceptanceCriteria: The partners/logos section background is light (white or soft neutral), not black or dark
The combined logos image is rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated/
The section is compact and does not take excessive vertical space
No individual logo components remain; the single combined image replaces them all

file_operations.description: In the pharmaceutical partners section, replace the existing grid of individual partner logo images with a single img element that displays the combined logos image from frontend/public/assets/generated/partner-logos-light.dim_1320x860.png. Update the section's background to white or a light neutral color. Reduce the section padding and container constraints to create a more compact, space-efficient layout. Remove all individual logo img elements and their surrounding container structures.
